missile-launch.prompt: Sci-fi missile launch from a futuristic anti-gravity race ship: heavy pressurized thump ignition, then a hissing rocket motor streaking away with doppler. Punchy arcade game weapon sound.

explosion.prompt: Arcade sci-fi explosion: punchy deep boom with a fireball whoosh, metallic debris scattering and crackling, short tail. Stylized video game weapon impact, not realistic warfare.

player-hit.prompt: Huge stylized game explosion right on the player: deep sub-bass blast, then electrical crackle and sizzling sparks aftermath, short.

mine-drop.prompt: A small metallic mine released with a soft mechanical clunk and a quick electronic arming beep, video game.

shield-up.prompt: Sci-fi energy shield activating: a rising electric shimmer swelling into a protective bubble, short and bright, video game power-up.

nitro.prompt: Nitrous boost ignition: a deep pressurized thump and a rising surge of thrust, punchy arcade game boost.

boost-pad.prompt: Quick energy boost pad whoosh: an accelerating swoosh with a bright electric edge, very short, arcade racer.

near-miss.prompt: Extremely fast near-miss flyby whoosh: a vehicle passing very close at high speed, tight doppler swish, short and punchy.

wall-hit.prompt: A fast hovercraft slamming against a metal barrier: heavy dull impact with a short metallic scrape, video game.

pickup.prompt: Bright arcade weapon pickup chirp: two quick ascending electronic notes, clean and short.

fizzle.prompt: A soft deflating power-down fizzle: descending electronic whine with a little static puff, short, video game.

shield-hum.prompt: Continuous sci-fi energy shield hum: warm electric force field drone, steady subtle pulsing, seamless loop, no melody.
